Area of Research

EVO Lab focuses on artificial intelligence applications in the field of human–machine interaction. Research topics include soft robotics, rehabilitation robotics, medical imaging, haptic systems, evolutionary optimization, path planning, machine learning, and computer vision.

Group URL:
